task: Rebuild the supplied decision logic for abatement cost-curve uncertainty ranking using only the embedded packet. Identify records that cross the normalized threshold, compute margin = normalized_threshold_score - observed_risk_score and classify each record (fail if margin < 0; warn if 0 <= margin <= 5% of limit; pass if margin > 5% of limit). Test sensitivity (+/-5% and other specified shifts) to show whether any record's classification changes; set expert-review flag if any classification changes after a 5% sensitivity shift. Evaluate remediation option combinations (O1, O2, O3) only if total cost <= remediation_budget_usd and report their effect on normalized risk contributions. Produce a review-ready decision packet and deliver two artifacts with reproducible formulas and row-level citations to the embedded packet: abatement_cost_curve.xlsx (spreadsheet with formulas/executable logic and intermediate calculations) and investment_note.md (narrow decision memo containing explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes, unresolved ambiguities flagged as needs_review, and a final decision table). Do not invent or fetch outside data; use only the embedded packet. Mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review.
